overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a video game depicting a gothic great hall with high wooden ceilings, ornate chandeliers, and long dining tables. Several NPCs sit at tables while warm interior lighting mixes with cool blue light from tall arched windows. A single character walks across the hall midway through the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with dining tables and hanging chandeliers

events.description: a student character walks from right to left across the hall, temporarily passing through the foreground

agents.ego_description: standing stationary in the great hall, observing the surroundings and other students seated at tables

notable_agents.action: sitting at a wooden table in the right foreground, facing away from the camera
walking briskly across the hall from right to left between the tables

entered.detail: large iron chandelier with multiple candles hanging from the ceiling on the left side
large iron chandelier hanging centrally, slightly further back than the left one
tall arched wooden doorway at the far end of the hall with intricate stone surround
circular clock mounted on the wall above the main doorway
tall gothic windows with blue moonlight filtering through on the left wall
long wooden dining table with attached benches in the right foreground

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a static view of a grand gothic hall illuminated by warm chandelier light and cool blue window light. Several students sit at wooden tables scattered throughout the space. At approximately 18 seconds, a character walks briskly from right to left across the hall, passing between the tables before the scene returns to its previous static state.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, cinematic gaze over a grand gothic hall where warm interior glows contrast with cool atmospheric light. It begins with a wide view of the space, capturing students seated at long wooden tables beneath high ceilings and ornate chandeliers. As the scene unfolds, a single character briskly interrupts the stillness, walking from right to left across the hall and passing between the seated figures. The movement then subsides as the character exits the frame, returning the environment to its initial state of quiet, scholarly repose.
